overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian industrial district. The player moves from a covered underpass through an open plaza with massive industrial towers, approaching a restricted checkpoint marked 'SECTOR B' with a burning vehicle at the entrance.

events.description: begins under concrete overpass near parked teal sports car
approaching exit from covered area into brighter natural light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway beneath the overpass

entered.detail: futuristic teal sports car parked under the overpass with glowing red taillights
massive concrete overpass ceiling and support columns
yellow construction barriers lining the left side of the walkway
wet concrete sidewalk with puddles reflecting overhead lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass in a dystopian industrial area. A teal sports car is parked on the right as the player walks forward through the covered walkway, passing yellow construction barriers on the left. The lighting is artificial with fluorescent ceiling lights, and the ground shows wet patches reflecting the lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza between massive industrial towers

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with industrial towers
camera tilts upward to look at towering industrial buildings and skybridges

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza and looking up at massive industrial architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza ahead

entered.detail: massive green industrial tower with scaffolding and external structures
tall building with distinctive gold and black striped facade
yellow plastic construction barriers lining the path
open asphalt plaza with patches of overgrown weeds

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza bathed in natural morning light. Massive industrial towers dominate the skyline, including a distinctive green tower with scaffolding and a gold-striped building. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the architecture and skybridges overhead while continuing to walk forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: street leading to Sector B checkpoint

events.description: Sector B overpass structure becomes visible ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Sector B entrance through the industrial district

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the Sector B entrance

entered.detail: large industrial overpass with 'SECTOR B' signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving through the industrial street toward the Sector B checkpoint, the massive overpass structure with its prominent signage becomes the focal point ahead. The green industrial tower now appears on the left side as the camera advances. Yellow plastic barriers line the right side of the road, and a few pedestrians are visible near the entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: restricted access tunnel under Sector B overpass

events.description: enters covered passage beneath the Sector B overpass structure
approaches burning vehicle with active flames near the no entry zone

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage under Sector B toward the restricted area with the burning car

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near debris and blue tarps on the right side

entered.detail: vehicle engulfed in flames with smoke rising, located at the end of the passage
yellow sign with black text reading 'NO ENTRY' above the restricted area
large concrete blocks blocking vehicle access
piles of trash, blue tarps, and discarded materials along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into the narrow, enclosed passage beneath the Sector B overpass. The structure looms overhead with its massive support beams and 'SECTOR B' signage. The path leads toward a restricted area marked with a yellow 'NO ENTRY' sign, where a car burns with active flames. Debris and discarded materials line the sides of the concrete walkway as the player approaches the checkpoint.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, artificial underpass into a sprawling industrial plaza before concluding at a restricted checkpoint. It begins beneath a concrete overpass, moving past a teal sports car and yellow construction barriers under fluorescent lights that reflect off wet patches on the ground. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza bathed in natural morning light, where the view tilts upward to reveal massive industrial towers and overhead skybridges. The movement then continues along an industrial street, with the green tower shifting to the left and the massive Sector B overpass becoming the focal point ahead. Finally, the camera enters the narrow, enclosed passage beneath the overpass, passing a no-entry sign and debris to approach a burning vehicle at the checkpoint.
